hero_sub: We build economic models that show how trade, energy and technology decisions affect economies before they are made.
clients_label: Some of the institutions we've worked with
about_lede: Good analysis combines evidence, expertise and context instead of treating every outcome as zero-sum.
about_paragraph: We build the models behind decisions made by governments, NGOs and businesses.
about_figure_sub: Every engagement adds to a shared body of models, data and insight — and none of it diminishes.
capabilities_intro: Economic modelling, supply-chain analysis, data science and policy strategy.
industries_intro: Explore how we apply our methods across 12 sectors.
spotlight_intro: Selected studies from the Infisum team.
cta_text: Tell us the question. We will show what the evidence says.
